title: salix flabellaris
intro: Salix flabellaris, also known as the paddle-shaped willow or roundleaf willow, is a shrub or small tree species in the willow family. The bark of the Salix flabellaris plant contains salicin, a compound that has been used to relieve pain and reduce inflammation. The medicinal properties of Salix flabellaris have been used to treat various health issues, including fever reduction, pain relief, and gastrointestinal problems. Herbal preparations of Salix flabellaris, such as teas and tinctures, have been used to promote health benefits, including reducing blood pressure and alleviating symptoms of menopause.
